nodeTypes.name: edit-fields
nodeTypes.label: Edit Fields
nodeTypes.description: Set field values from static values or template expressions.

nodeTypes.name: file-system
nodeTypes.label: File System
nodeTypes.description: File operations: rename, copy, move, delete, mkdir, exists, list.

nodeTypes.name: group
nodeTypes.label: Group
nodeTypes.description: Container for child nodes. Orchestrates sequential or parallel execution.

nodeTypes.name: http-request
nodeTypes.label: HTTP Request
nodeTypes.description: Make HTTP requests to APIs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.).

nodeTypes.name: image
nodeTypes.label: Image
nodeTypes.description: Image processing: resize, convert formats, compress, composite, batch.

nodeTypes.name: input
nodeTypes.label: Input
nodeTypes.description: Declares how data enters the recipe. Read by the environment to render the appropriate input widget.

nodeTypes.name: loop
nodeTypes.label: Loop
nodeTypes.description: Iterate over arrays (forEach), repeat N times, or loop while condition.

nodeTypes.name: output
nodeTypes.label: Output
nodeTypes.description: Declares how results are delivered. Read by the environment to render the appropriate output widget.

nodeTypes.name: parallel
nodeTypes.label: Parallel
nodeTypes.description: Execute tasks concurrently with configurable worker pool and error strategy.

nodeTypes.name: shell-command
nodeTypes.label: Shell Command
nodeTypes.description: Execute shell commands with stall detection, retry, and streaming output.

nodeTypes.name: spreadsheet
nodeTypes.label: Spreadsheet
nodeTypes.description: Read and write CSV or Excel files.

nodeTypes.name: transform
nodeTypes.label: Transform
nodeTypes.description: Transform data using expressions (single value) or field mappings.

processors.name: Rename Files
processors.description: Transform filenames using patterns, find/replace, and case rules

parameters.name: find
parameters.label: Find
parameters.description: Text or regex pattern to search for in the filename

parameters.name: case
parameters.label: Case
parameters.description: Transform the filename to a specific case

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.label: Prefix
parameters.description: Text to prepend to the filename

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.label: Suffix
parameters.description: Text to append before the file extension

processors.name: Compress Images
processors.description: Reduce image file size while maintaining quality

parameters.name: quality
parameters.label: Quality
parameters.description: Compression quality (1 = smallest file, 100 = best quality)

processors.name: Convert Image Format
processors.description: Convert images between JPEG, PNG, and WebP formats

parameters.name: format
parameters.label: Output Format
parameters.description: The target image format to convert to

processors.name: Resize Images
processors.description: Change image dimensions while maintaining quality

parameters.name: maintainAspect
parameters.label: Maintain Aspect Ratio
parameters.description: Keep the original width-to-height ratio when resizing

processors.name: Clean CSV
processors.description: Remove empty rows, trim whitespace, and deduplicate CSV data

parameters.name: trimWhitespace
parameters.label: Trim Whitespace
parameters.description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace from every cell

parameters.name: removeEmptyRows
parameters.label: Remove Empty Rows
parameters.description: Skip rows where every cell is blank

parameters.name: removeDuplicates
parameters.label: Remove Duplicates
parameters.description: Remove duplicate rows, keeping the first occurrence

processors.name: Rename CSV Columns
processors.description: Rename column headers in a CSV file

parameters.name: columns
parameters.label: Column Mapping
parameters.description: Map of old column names to new names (e.g., {"Name": "full_name"})
